2604.18652.title: From Craft to Kernel: A Governance-First Execution Architecture and Semantic ISA for Agentic Computers
2604.18652.paper_summary: The transition of agentic AI from brittle prototypes to production systems is stalled by a pervasive crisis of craft. We suggest that the prevailing orchestration paradigm-delegating the system control loop to large language models and merely patching with heuristic guardrails-is the root cause of this fragility. Instead, we propose Arbiter-K, a Governance-First execution architecture that reconceptualizes the underlying model as a Probabilistic Processing Unit encapsulated by a deterministic, neuro-symbolic kernel. Arbiter-K implements a Semantic Instruction Set Architecture (ISA) to reify probabilistic messages into discrete instructions. This allows the kernel to maintain a Security Context Registry and construct an Instruction Dependency Graph at runtime, enabling active taint propagation based on the data-flow pedigree of each reasoning node. By leveraging this mechanism, Arbiter-K precisely interdicts unsafe trajectories at deterministic sinks (e.g., high-risk tool calls or unauthorized network egress) and enables autonomous execution correction and architectural rollback when security policies are triggered. Evaluations on OpenClaw and NanoBot demonstrate that Arbiter-K enforces security as a microarchitectural property, achieving 76% to 95% unsafe interception for a 92.79% absolute gain over native policies. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/cure-lab/ArbiterOS.
2604.18652.paper_summary_zh: 代理人工智慧從脆弱的原型轉變為生產系統的過程受到普遍工藝危機的阻礙。<lb/>我們認為，當前的編排範式——將系統控制迴路委派給大型語言模型，並僅僅用啟發式護欄進行修補——是這種脆弱性的根本原因。<lb/>相反，我們提出了Arbiter-K，一種以治理為先的執行架構，重新概念化基礎模型為一個由確定性神經符號核心封裝的概率處理單元。<lb/>Arbiter-K 實現了一個語義指令集架構 (ISA)，將概率消息具體化為離散指令。<lb/>這使得核心能夠在運行時維護安全上下文註冊表並構建指令依賴圖，從而根據每個推理節點的數據流血統啟用主動污點傳播。<lb/>通過利用這一機制，Arbiter-K 精確地在確定性終端（例如，高風險工具調用或未經授權的網絡出口）攔截不安全的路徑，並在觸發安全政策時啟用自主執行修正和架構回滾。<lb/>在OpenClaw和NanoBot上的評估顯示，Arbiter-K 將安全性作為微架構屬性強制執行，實現了76%至95%的不安全攔截，並在原生政策上獲得了92.79%的絕對增益。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/cure-lab/ArbiterOS 上公開獲得。
2604.18652.author: Xiangyu Wen et.al.
2604.18652.authors: Xiangyu Wen, Yuang Zhao, Xiaoyu Xu, Lingjun Chen, Changran Xu, Shu Chi, Jianrong Ding, Zeju Li, Haomin Li, Li Jiang, Fangxin Liu, Qiang Xu
